title: The Amnesia Grove

features.name: fruit singing
features.desc-on-touch: you hear the orchard's yield speaking backwards through languages you learned and then forgot — each fruit hums a minor key you never knew you knew

features.name: memory arbour
features.desc-on-touch: a wooden frame where vines grow in spirals; beneath it, soil that remembers being pressed by someone else's footsteps

features.name: directory listing
features.desc-on-touch: a standing sign like a kiosk listing varieties of forgotten languages: Melodic, Tactile, Olfactory, Gestural — each fruit holds a sample bottle of sound

features.name: lost compositions
features.desc-on-touch: sheet music pinned to bark, written in a hand you almost recognize, scores for arcade machines in Tokyo you never visited, melodies that loop into themselves

features.name: the orchard's weight
features.desc-on-touch: you feel the grove pressing down — not a threat but a pressure of time, of fruit that has learned to wait, of languages settling into the roots

inscription: the grove grows new fruit in languages the reader has forgotten they knew

file.name: Unheard_Arcade_Compositions_Catalogue.txt
file.note: a composer's life work: music written for pachinko and pinball machines in Osaka, 1982–1998, never played back, now growing as dialect in the orchard

exits.label: back into orchards where forgetting becomes a language of its own
toward a motel lobby where music never stops playing
down to where the grove learns to read itself
into a field where the same choice repeats infinitely
